title: erianthus pedicellaris
intro: Erianthus pedicellaris, also known as the 'Wood Grass' or 'Hare's Foot Grass', is a perennial grass native to North America and is known for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Erianthus pedicellaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, which can lead to improved overall health. Erianthus pedicellaris can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
